message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="T3 test-agent: Task Entity+Repo tests">
You are test-agent for task T3: M2 - Task Entity + Repository + DTOs.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- Task: Create Task entity, repository with custom queries, and request/response DTOs.
  ALLOWED files (5):
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepository.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskRequest.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskPageResponse.java

  Key requirements:
  - Task entity: id (Long, auto), title (1-200), description (max 5000), priority (enum HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW, default MEDIUM), status (enum TODO/IN_PROGRESS/DONE/CLOSED, default TODO), createdBy (Long), createdAt (LocalDateTime auto), updatedAt (LocalDateTime nullable), deleted (boolean, default false)
  - Priority enum: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW — can be in Task.java or separate file within allowed scope
  - TaskStatus enum: TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, CLOSED — can be in Task.java or separate file within allowed scope
  - TaskRepository: extends JpaRepository<Task, Long>. Custom queries:
    - Find non-deleted tasks with optional keyword (title LIKE %keyword% case-insensitive), optional priority filter, optional status filter, with Pageable support
    - findByIdAndDeletedFalse(Long id) → Optional<Task>
  - TaskRequest: title (required, 1-200), description (optional, max 5000), priority (optional, enum)
  - TaskResponse: all entity fields mapped
  - TaskPageResponse: content (List<TaskResponse>), page, size, totalElements, totalPages

  AC coverage: M2-AC1,2,3,8,10,11,12,15,16

- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- READONLY context (T1 implementation):
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java (read for entity pattern reference)
- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/logs/test-agent-3.log.md

YOUR JOB: Design and write tests BEFORE any implementation code exists.

TEST DESIGN STRATEGY:
1. Red/Green Tests — entity field access, repository queries, DTO mapping
2. Boundary Tests — title empty/201 chars, description 5001 chars, null priority defaults to MEDIUM
3. Error Case Tests — validation failures
4. Contract Tests — TaskResponse matches CONTRACT shared type

Write tests for:
- TaskTest (entity unit test): field access, defaults, enum values
- TaskRepositoryTest (@DataJpaTest): CRUD, soft-delete filtering, keyword search, priority filter, pagination
- TaskRequestTest: validation annotations
- TaskResponseTest / TaskPageResponseTest: DTO structure

IMPORTANT: Read User.java to follow the same entity pattern (annotations, @PrePersist, etc).

NOTE: The enums (Priority, TaskStatus) may be defined as inner enums in Task.java, or as separate top-level classes. Write tests that work either way by importing from the entity package. Prefer testing through the Task entity fields.

IMPLEMENTATION NOTES: Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/temp/impl-notes-3.md

Tech: Spring Boot 3.2.3, Java 17, NO Lombok, JUnit 5, @DataJpaTest, TestEntityManager

OUTPUT:
- Write test files
- Write implementation notes
- Return: list of test file paths + count summary
</teammate-message>

Let me read the required context files first.

     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest

     6→[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts
     7→

[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=M3 | name=Task State Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
    17→[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    18→[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]
    19→
    20→[SECTION] Error Format
    21→[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body
    22→
    23→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    24→[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
    25→[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
    26→[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
    27→[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    30→

[VERSION] 1

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]

[SECTION] Error Format
[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body

[SECTION] State Machine Rules
[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)

[SECTION] Amendment Log

content.content:
1→# M2: Task CRUD
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組提供任務（Task）的完整 CRUD 操作，包含建立、讀取、更新與刪除功能，以及支援分頁查詢、關鍵字搜尋與篩選條件的任務列表端點。所有端點皆需要通過 JWT 身份驗證。
     6→
     7→每個任務包含標題、描述、優先級等欄位。建立任務時自動記錄建立者（createdBy）與建立時間（createdAt），更新時自動記錄更新時間（updatedAt）。刪除採用軟刪除策略，設置 deleted 標記而非實際從資料庫移除記錄。
     8→
     9→任務列表支援分頁、排序、依標題關鍵字搜尋，以及依優先級篩選，確保大量資料時的查詢效能與使用者體驗。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 POST /api/tasks 帶入 title、description、priority，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含完整任務物件（含自動產生的 id、createdBy、createdAt）
    14→- AC2: 建立任務時未帶 priority，任務的 priority 預設為 MEDIUM
    15→- AC3: 建立任務時未帶 title 或 title 為空字串，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    16→- AC4: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含完整任務物件
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入不存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    18→- AC6: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 PUT /api/tasks/{id} 帶入更新欄位，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應反映更新後的內容，updatedAt 欄位有值
    19→- AC7: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 DELETE /api/tasks/{id}，回傳 HTTP 204 No Content，該任務被軟刪除
    20→- AC8: 軟刪除的任務不出現在 GET /api/tasks 的列表查詢結果中
    21→- AC9: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 存取已軟刪除的任務，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    22→- AC10: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks 不帶任何參數，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應為分頁格式，預設 page=0、size=20、按 createdAt 降序排列
    23→- AC11: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?keyword=xxx，僅回傳 title 包含該關鍵字的任務（不區分大小寫）
    24→- AC12: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?priority=HIGH，僅回傳 priority 為 HIGH 的任務
    25→- AC13: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?page=1&size=5，回傳正確的第二頁資料（跳過前 5 筆）
    26→- AC14: 不攜帶 Token 呼叫任何任務端點，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    27→- AC15: title 超過 200 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    28→- AC16: description 超過 5000 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    29→
    30→## API 端點
    31→
    32→### POST /api/tasks
    33→- 說明: 建立新任務
    34→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    35→- Request Body:
    36→  ```json
    37→  {
    38→    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    39→    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    40→    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW, default: MEDIUM)"
    41→  }
    42→  ```
    43→- Success Response: 201 Created
    44→  ```json
    45→  {
    46→    "id": "long",
    47→    "title": "string",
    48→    "description": "string",
    49→    "priority": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
    50→    "status": "TODO",
    51→    "createdBy": "long (user id)",
    52→    "createdAt": "ISO 8601 datetime",
    53→    "updatedAt": "ISO 8601 datetime or null"
    54→  }
    55→  ```
    56→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized)
    57→
    58→### GET /api/tasks/{id}
    59→- 說明: 取得單一任務詳情
    60→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    61→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    62→- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同上）
    63→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found or soft-deleted)
    64→
    65→### PUT /api/tasks/{id}
    66→- 說明: 更新任務內容
    67→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    68→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    69→- Request Body:
    70→  ```json
    71→  {
    72→    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    73→    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    74→    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)"
    75→  }
    76→  ```
    77→- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同建立，updatedAt 更新）
    78→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    79→
    80→### DELETE /api/tasks/{id}
    81→- 說明: 軟刪除任務
    82→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    83→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    84→- Success Response: 204 No Content
    85→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    86→
    87→### GET /api/tasks
    88→- 說明: 分頁查詢任務列表（支援搜尋與篩選）
    89→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    90→- Query Parameters:
    91→  - `page` (int, optional, default: 0) — 頁碼，從 0 開始
    92→  - `size` (int, optional, default: 20) — 每頁筆數
    93→  - `sort` (string, optional, default: "createdAt,desc") — 排序欄位與方向
    94→  - `keyword` (string, optional) — 依標題搜尋的關鍵字（不區分大小寫，模糊比對）
    95→  - `priority` (string, optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW) — 依優先級篩選
    96→- Success Response: 200 OK
    97→  ```json
    98→  {
    99→    "content": [{ "id": 1, "title": "...", "..." : "..." }],
   100→    "page": 0,
   101→    "size": 20,
   102→    "totalElements": 100,
   103→    "totalPages": 5
   104→  }
   105→  ```
   106→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized)
   107→
   108→## 業務規則
   109→
   110→- BR1: title 為必填欄位，長度限制 1-200 字元
   111→- BR2: description 為選填欄位，最大長度 5000 字元
   112→- BR3: priority 為列舉值，僅接受 HIGH、MEDIUM、LOW 三種值，未指定時預設為 MEDIUM
   113→- BR4: 建立任務時自動從 JWT Token 中擷取 createdBy（使用者 ID），不接受前端傳入
   114→- BR5: 建立任務時自動記錄 createdAt 為伺服器當前時間
   115→- BR6: 更新任務時自動記錄 updatedAt 為伺服器當前時間
   116→- BR7: 刪除為軟刪除（設置 deleted=true 或 deletedAt 時間戳），不實際移除資料庫記錄
   117→- BR8: 所有列表查詢自動排除已軟刪除的任務
   118→- BR9: 分頁預設值：page=0、size=20、sort=createdAt,desc
   119→- BR10: 新建任務的初始狀態為 TODO（由 M3 模組定義）
   120→
   121→## 相依模組
   122→
   123→- 依賴: M1 (Authentication) — 所有端點需要 JWT 身份驗證
   124→- 被依賴: M3 (Task State Machine)、M4 (Tag System)、M6 (Task Filter)、M7 (Dashboard)
   125→

file.content:
# M2: Task CRUD

## 需求描述

本模組提供任務（Task）的完整 CRUD 操作，包含建立、讀取、更新與刪除功能，以及支援分頁查詢、關鍵字搜尋與篩選條件的任務列表端點。所有端點皆需要通過 JWT 身份驗證。

每個任務包含標題、描述、優先級等欄位。建立任務時自動記錄建立者（createdBy）與建立時間（createdAt），更新時自動記錄更新時間（updatedAt）。刪除採用軟刪除策略，設置 deleted 標記而非實際從資料庫移除記錄。

任務列表支援分頁、排序、依標題關鍵字搜尋，以及依優先級篩選，確保大量資料時的查詢效能與使用者體驗。

## 驗收標準

- AC1: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 POST /api/tasks 帶入 title、description、priority，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含完整任務物件（含自動產生的 id、createdBy、createdAt）
- AC2: 建立任務時未帶 priority，任務的 priority 預設為 MEDIUM
- AC3: 建立任務時未帶 title 或 title 為空字串，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
- AC4: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含完整任務物件
- AC5: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入不存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
- AC6: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 PUT /api/tasks/{id} 帶入更新欄位，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應反映更新後的內容，updatedAt 欄位有值
- AC7: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 DELETE /api/tasks/{id}，回傳 HTTP 204 No Content，該任務被軟刪除
- AC8: 軟刪除的任務不出現在 GET /api/tasks 的列表查詢結果中
- AC9: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 存取已軟刪除的任務，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
- AC10: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks 不帶任何參數，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應為分頁格式，預設 page=0、size=20、按 createdAt 降序排列
- AC11: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?keyword=xxx，僅回傳 title 包含該關鍵字的任務（不區分大小寫）
- AC12: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?priority=HIGH，僅回傳 priority 為 HIGH 的任務
- AC13: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?page=1&size=5，回傳正確的第二頁資料（跳過前 5 筆）
- AC14: 不攜帶 Token 呼叫任何任務端點，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
- AC15: title 超過 200 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
- AC16: description 超過 5000 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request

## API 端點

### POST /api/tasks
- 說明: 建立新任務
- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- Request Body:
  ```json
  {
    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW, default: MEDIUM)"
  }
  ```
- Success Response: 201 Created
  ```json
  {
    "id": "long",
    "title": "string",
    "description": "string",
    "priority": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
    "status": "TODO",
    "createdBy": "long (user id)",
    "createdAt": "ISO 8601 datetime",
    "updatedAt": "ISO 8601 datetime or null"
  }
  ```
- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized)

### GET /api/tasks/{id}
- 說明: 取得單一任務詳情
- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同上）
- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found or soft-deleted)

### PUT /api/tasks/{id}
- 說明: 更新任務內容
- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
- Request Body:
  ```json
  {
    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)"
  }
  ```
- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同建立，updatedAt 更新）
- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)

### DELETE /api/tasks/{id}
- 說明: 軟刪除任務
- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
- Success Response: 204 No Content
- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)

### GET /api/tasks
- 說明: 分頁查詢任務列表（支援搜尋與篩選）
- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- Query Parameters:
  - `page` (int, optional, default: 0) — 頁碼，從 0 開始
  - `size` (int, optional, default: 20) — 每頁筆數
  - `sort` (string, optional, default: "createdAt,desc") — 排序欄位與方向
  - `keyword` (string, optional) — 依標題搜尋的關鍵字（不區分大小寫，模糊比對）
  - `priority` (string, optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW) — 依優先級篩選
- Success Response: 200 OK
  ```json
  {
    "content": [{ "id": 1, "title": "...", "..." : "..." }],
    "page": 0,
    "size": 20,
    "totalElements": 100,
    "totalPages": 5
  }
  ```
- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized)

## 業務規則

- BR1: title 為必填欄位，長度限制 1-200 字元
- BR2: description 為選填欄位，最大長度 5000 字元
- BR3: priority 為列舉值，僅接受 HIGH、MEDIUM、LOW 三種值，未指定時預設為 MEDIUM
- BR4: 建立任務時自動從 JWT Token 中擷取 createdBy（使用者 ID），不接受前端傳入
- BR5: 建立任務時自動記錄 createdAt 為伺服器當前時間
- BR6: 更新任務時自動記錄 updatedAt 為伺服器當前時間
- BR7: 刪除為軟刪除（設置 deleted=true 或 deletedAt 時間戳），不實際移除資料庫記錄
- BR8: 所有列表查詢自動排除已軟刪除的任務
- BR9: 分頁預設值：page=0、size=20、sort=createdAt,desc
- BR10: 新建任務的初始狀態為 TODO（由 M3 模組定義）

## 相依模組

- 依賴: M1 (Authentication) — 所有端點需要 JWT 身份驗證
- 被依賴: M3 (Task State Machine)、M4 (Tag System)、M6 (Task Filter)、M7 (Dashboard)

Now let me write the implementation notes and the test log.

input.description: Ensure temp and logs directories exist

input.content:
# Implementation Notes for T3: Task Entity + Repository + DTOs

## Entity Pattern (from User.java)
- Use `@PrePersist` for auto-setting `createdAt` (same as User entity)
- No Lombok — manual getters/setters required
- Jakarta validation annotations on entity fields

## Task Entity Requirements
- Enums `Priority` (HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW) and `TaskStatus` (TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, CLOSED) can be inner enums of Task
- Field defaults: `priority = MEDIUM`, `status = TODO`, `deleted = false`
- `@Size(min=1, max=200)` + `@NotBlank` on title
- `@Size(max=5000)` on description (nullable)
- `@Column(length=5000)` for description to match DB column
- `@Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)` for priority and status enums
- `updatedAt` is nullable — no auto-set in @PrePersist, only on update

## Repository Query Design
- Tests expect a method named `findByFilters(String keyword, Priority priority, TaskStatus status, Pageable pageable)` returning `Page<Task>`
- This method must filter `deleted = false` always
- keyword filter: `LOWER(t.title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :keyword, '%'))` when keyword is not null
- priority filter: `t.priority = :priority` when priority is not null
- status filter: `t.status = :status` when status is not null
- Use `@Query` with JPQL and conditional logic via `(:keyword IS NULL OR ...)` pattern
- Also need `findByIdAndDeletedFalse(Long id)` -> `Optional<Task>` (Spring Data derived query)

## DTO Requirements
- TaskRequest: title (@NotBlank @Size(min=1,max=200)), description (@Size(max=5000) nullable), priority (nullable, enum)
- TaskResponse: all fields matching CONTRACT — id, title, description, priority, status, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
- TaskPageResponse: content (List<TaskResponse>), page (int), size (int), totalElements (long), totalPages (int)

## Framework Pitfalls
- @DataJpaTest uses H2 by default, ensure enum storage as STRING not ORDINAL
- @PrePersist only fires on entityManager.persist(), not on new Task() — tests verify null before persist
- The `findByFilters` JPQL query must handle null parameters correctly; use `(:param IS NULL OR t.field = :param)` pattern
- For enum parameters in JPQL with the IS NULL pattern, ensure the query works with H2

input.content:
# Test Agent 3 Log — T3: Task Entity + Repository + DTOs

## Context Read
- User.java: entity pattern with @PrePersist, Jakarta validation, no Lombok
- CONTRACT: TaskResponse(id,title,description?,priority,status,createdBy,createdAt,updatedAt?), TaskPageResponse(content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages)
- M2 spec: AC1-AC16 reviewed, focused on AC1,2,3,8,10,11,12,15,16

## Test Files Written

### 1. TaskTest.java (20 tests)
- Field access and defaults (id null, createdAt null, updatedAt null, deleted false)
- Priority enum: 3 values, valueOf, default MEDIUM
- TaskStatus enum: 4 values, valueOf, default TODO
- Title validation: null, empty, 1-char, 200-char, 201-char boundary
- Description validation: null ok, 5000-char, 5001-char boundary

### 2. TaskRepositoryTest.java (17 tests)
- CRUD basics: auto ID, auto createdAt, persist all fields, default priority, default status
- findByIdAndDeletedFalse: active task found, soft-deleted not found, nonexistent empty
- findByFilters: exclude soft-deleted (AC8), all active no filters (AC10), keyword case-insensitive (AC11), priority filter (AC12), status filter, combined keyword+priority, combined all filters
- Pagination: page size + total count, sorting by createdAt DESC, empty result, partial keyword match
- Standard findById still returns soft-deleted (verifying custom query is needed)

### 3. TaskRequestTest.java (11 tests)
- Valid request, optional description, optional priority
- Title validation: null, empty, 1-char, 200-char, 201-char
- Description validation: 5000-char, 5001-char
- Getter/setter coverage

### 4. TaskResponseTest.java (4 tests)
- All fields get/set, null description, null updatedAt
- Contract field verification (all 8 fields from CONTRACT)

### 5. TaskPageResponseTest.java (3 tests)
- All fields get/set, empty content, contract structure verification

## Summary
- Total test files: 5
- Total test methods: 55
- AC coverage: M2-AC1(entity fields), AC2(default priority), AC3(title validation), AC8(soft-delete filtering), AC10(pagination defaults), AC11(keyword search), AC12(priority filter), AC15(title 200 limit), AC16(description 5000 limit)
